code_value: Hello, I'm Tom. Last winter holiday, I visited my grandpa in the countryside. He had a pet bird called Bob. Bob was white with two small eyes. He had a beautiful voice and loved to sing. Every day, I played with Bob. In the morning, when I helped my grandpa water the flowers, Bob stood on my shoulder and sang happily. For lunch, I fed him some corn and fruit. He enjoyed them a lot. At night, I read books when he slept quietly on the desk. He became my friend. I had a wonderful holiday because of Bob.

你将听到Tom介绍他在寒假与Bob成为朋友的经历的短文，录音播放两遍。请根据所听到的内容，选择思维导图中正确的信息（二选一），在50秒钟内说一段话转述他的介绍（包含四个要点的内容）。


[startContent] Last winter holiday, Tom made friends with his grandpa's pet in the countryside. ...
